properties.name: disabled
properties.description: Whether the input element is disabled

properties.name: error-text
properties.description: Sets the error message and error state

properties.name: helper-text
properties.description: Gives addition context to the user

properties.name: label
properties.description: Label of the the Radio Group

properties.name: orientation
properties.description: Sets axis on which the tabs are aligned

events.name: change
events.description: Fires a custom 'change' event when the value changes

slots.name: default
slots.description: For Radio components to provide options

slots.name: helper-text
slots.description: To add rich text to provide addition context for the user

methods.name: checkValidity
methods.description: Returns `true` if the element passes validity checks; otherwise, returns `false` and fires an `invalid` event at the element.
